title: The PotatoPanda Modpack
description: An enhanced Vanilla modpack that focuses on providing a refreshing experience while improving performance and keeping a vanilla feel.
body:
# About
The PotatoPanda modpack is a compilation of mods that provide visual enhancements, performance improvements, and new content for all three dimensions. It aims to add content that fits in with the vanilla environment. Various vanilla features have been improved and revised to make the gameplay experience more interesting and enticing to seasoned players. These features include added seasons, enhanced farming, revised End and Nether dimensions, and more. There are also many performance enhancing mods included that will improve your framerate.

**This pack was created for the PotatoPanda Youtube community discord. However, anyone who comes across this modpack is welcome to use it for their own singleplayer world or multiplayer server.**

## Planned Updates
Low-end and High-end versions of this pack will be released in the future so that weaker PCs can play at a higher framerate, and stronger PCs can play at a higher fidelity.

**Version updates are planned as mods become compatible**
